prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 5.7L Hemi (EZB/EZD) with a stroked 6.4L (392ci) forged internals build using a Manley 4340 forged crankshaft (4.050" stroke), Manley I-beam connecting rods (6.125" length), and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.5:1 compression) for NA reliability or 9.5:1 for forced induction. Pair with a Comp Cams XFI 280HR camshaft (230°/236° duration @ 0.050", 0.612"/0.617" lift) and PAC Racing valve springs (140 lbs seat, 400 lbs open) to handle 7,500 RPM safely.

Forced Induction: Install a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (82mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with a custom Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate and Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve. Use a custom intercooler setup with a PWR 4.5" thick bar-and-plate core (24" x 12" x 4.5") and Vibrant Performance 3.5" silicone couplers. Fuel system upgrades include a Fore Innovations 450 LPH fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual catch can system to manage crankcase pressure.

Drivetrain & Handling: Swap the stock 8HP70 transmission for a ZF 8HP95 with a Sonnax billet torque converter (3,500 RPM stall) and a PML Level 4 valve body. Install a Getrag 3102 6-speed manual conversion with a Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch and billet flywheel. Suspension upgrades include BC Racing BR coilovers (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) with Swift Springs, Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and BMR Fabrication tubular K-member with adjustable camber plates. Braking is handled by a Brembo GT 6-piston front (380mm rotors) and 4-piston rear (355mm rotors) big brake kit with Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Install a Rocket Bunny V3 Challenger widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders (3.5" wider front, 4.5" wider rear), custom fabricated aluminum inner fenders, and a carbon fiber duckbill spoiler. Use a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap with satin red accents on the hood scoop, side skirts, and rear diffuser.

Aero & Lighting: Replace the front bumper with a custom carbon fiber splitter from APR Performance (3" overhang) and a custom aluminum undertray for front-end downforce. Rear diffuser is a custom 3-piece carbon fiber unit from Seibon with integrated quad exhaust exits (4.5" diameter, titanium tips from Burns Stainless). Lighting upgrades include Lamin-X yellow tinted headlight covers, Morimoto XB LED bulbs, and custom sequential LED taillights from Diode Dynamics.

Interior & Wheels: Install a full carbon fiber interior trim kit from Seibon (door cards, center console, dashboard trim) with Alcantara headliner and red stitching. Seats are Recaro Pole Position buckets with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Wheels are Forgeline GA3R 20x10.5" ET25 front and 20x12" ET45 rear with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (285/30/20 front, 315/30/20 rear).
